programme.title: Nova: Decoding the Pyramids

programme.title: History Detectives: Marion Carpenter Camera, Drug Smuggling Doll, Florida Map
programme.desc: Investigating a camera that could have belonged to the first woman photographer at the White House. Families of the Confederate South may have used this doll to smuggle medicine past the Northern Blockade.

programme.title: Africa's Great Civilizations: The Atlantic Age/ Commerce and the Clash of Civilizations
programme.desc: Gates explores the impact of the Atlantic world, creating new kingdoms & transatlantic slave trade. Gates explores the dynamism of 19th century Africa and the 'Scramble' for its riches.

programme.title: Breakthrough: The Ideas That Changed the World: The Robot
programme.desc: Learn how robots were first conceptualized in ancient Rome and see how their use has evolved over the centuries, from the calculator to the Roomba. Then, take a sneak peek at what future robots will be able to do.

programme.title: Nova: Decoding the Pyramids
programme.desc: Stunning new archaeological evidence provides clues about the Egyptians who built the Great Pyramid of Giza—and how they did it. Join researchers as they delve into the logbook of a work crew and discover how the massive project transformed Egypt.

programme.title: The Woman in White

programme.title: Cities of Light: The Rise and Fall of Islamic Spain
programme.desc: Muslims, Christians and Jews peacefully co-existed in Islamic Spain, influencing the European Renaissance until greed and intolerance destroyed the delicate balance of their cultures.

programme.title: Latino Americans: War and Peace
programme.desc: Tracing the World War II years and those that follow as Latino Americans serve their new country.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Official Story

programme.desc: When one of their own is implicated in a coverup, the SVU struggles to unravel a sex trafficking operation deeply rooted in government offices, the police department and the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Heightened Emotions
programme.desc: An athlete is the victim of sexual assault, but her secret double life could ruin both the case against her attacker and her Olympic future. Meanwhile, Rollins reconnects with her sister, Kim, when she is released on parole.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rape Interrupted
programme.desc: A sergeant makes Benson choose between loyalty and duty when his son is accused of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Broken Rhymes
programme.desc: A record label CEO and his protégé are questioned for their involvement in an assault on a transgendered student.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chasing Theo

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Flight Risk
programme.desc: An airline pilot accuses her captain of sexual assault so Barbra convenes a Grand Jury to determine their employer's complicity in the crime. Fin ensures that Benson is protected at work.

programme.title: Modern Family: Closet? You'll Love It!

programme.title: Modern Family: Spring Break

programme.title: Modern Family: Grill, Interrupted
programme.desc: Jay's birthday brings everyone together and Phil is beside himself over the super cool gift he got Jay, a high-tech outdoor grill. Claire and Mitch decide they will 'offer' to pay back the money Jay loaned them ages ago.

programme.title: Modern Family: Knock 'Em Down
programme.desc: Jay agrees to sub in on Cam's bowling team for the finals. Unfortunately Cam was not fully upfront about it being an all gay league, which puts Jay in a precarious position.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crying Out Loud
programme.desc: Determined to make Alex celebrate her senior ditch day, Phil, Luke and Haley forcefully take her out but end up on an unexpected detour. Claire is torn when she gets a job offer from a big hotel chain.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier's Edge

programme.title: Frasier: Cranes Unplugged
programme.desc: Frasier cannot adjust to his son's indifferent attitude and new interest in girls.

programme.title: Frasier: Motor Skills
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are humiliated over their lack of knowledge about automobile repairs.

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Must Go Off
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles re-discover a favourite Shakespearean actor slumming as a sci-fi star.

programme.title: Frasier: Sliding Frasiers
programme.desc: Frasier's two romantic universes collide; Niles and Daphne take a vacation in Hawaii.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Hedda Hopper Story
programme.desc: Lucy takes a dive trying to further Ricky's career by creating a splash.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Don Juan Is Shelved
programme.desc: Lucy launches an all-out campaign to keep her husband, Ricky, in Hollywood.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Bull Fight Dance
programme.desc: Lucy is tricked into accepting the role of a bull on a television show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Hollywood Anniversary
programme.desc: Ricky tells Lucy that he has a big party planned in a famous nightclub.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Cheryl Hines and 'Mama Said' podcast hosts, Jamie Lynn Sigler and Jenna Parris stop by.

programme.title: Movie: Harvest Moon
programme.desc: When her family goes bankrupt, a privileged city girl travels back to the country to try and fix up a struggling pumpkin farm that her father bought as an investment to get her money back.

programme.title: Movie: Royal Hearts
programme.desc: A Montana rancher learns he is the heir of a late King and has inherited the throne.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: The Office: Crime Aid
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part time job at corporate so she can afford to go to art school. After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at the corporate office wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news. Meanwhile, Dwight torments Andy and tries to get under his skin.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 20, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: Drunk History: Baseball

programme.title: Drunk History: Montgomery, Alabama
programme.desc: Percy Julian battles adversity to become one of the greatest scientists of all time, Claudette Colvin lays the groundwork for Rosa Parks and Joe Louis fights Max Schmeling.

programme.title: Drunk History: Cleveland
programme.desc: Wayne Wheeler becomes the face of Prohibition, Dorothy Fuldheim breaks barriers in news broadcasting and Muhammad Ali refuses to fight in the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Drunk History: Sports Heroes
programme.desc: Jim Thorpe is named the greatest athlete of the 20th century, Babe Didrikson breaks down gender barriers in sports, and Jim Abbott achieves prominence as a pitcher despite having only one hand.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 21, 2020

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Tale of the Tape
programme.desc: After a Delaware store clerk is murdered, a local drug dealer confesses to the crime, but there is doubt that what he said on tape can be believed.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: The Pastor's Secrets
programme.desc: Churchgoers knew something was up when pastor Matthew Winkler didn’t show up for services. After he’s found dead on his bedroom floor, twisted sex fantasies and dark family secrets start to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Harris Legacy
programme.desc: The discovery of mysterious fishing charts on the Cornelia Maria leads co-captains Josh Harris and Casey McManus to Hawaii to learn what Josh's late father, Captain Phil Harris, was attempting to accomplish decades ago.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Cold War Rivals (Part 1)
programme.desc: A dramatic change in the Russian crab industry rocks global markets and drives new competition between Dutch Harbor captains and their Russian adversaries. As crab prices skyrocket legendary captains return to claim their piece of a historic payday.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Cold War Rivals (Part 2)
programme.desc: After Russia rocks the crab industry, legendary Dutch Harbor captains return to get their part of what promises to be a handsome payday.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captain's Orders
programme.desc: A typhoon slams the Saga forcing Jake and Johnathan to make joint decisions. Sig races the storm to make the first offload. Rapid repairs land the Cornelia Marie in the eye of the storm. Captain Phil's charts lead Josh and Casey into treacherous seas.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Mystery of F/V Destination
programme.desc: Just miles from the fleet, the fishing vessel Destination disappears without a trace. In an unprecedented investigation, the mystery can finally be solved. But captains must make big changes, or risk sailing into the same peril on the icy Bering Sea.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captain's Orders
programme.desc: A typhoon slams the Saga forcing Jake and Johnathan to make joint decisions. Sig races the storm to make the first offload. Rapid repairs land the Cornelia Marie in the eye of the storm. Captain Phil's charts lead Josh and Casey into treacherous seas.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legend of the Time Bandit
programme.desc: A brutal winter on the ice has left the Bering Sea's most notorious crab boat severely damaged.

programme.title: Take Back the Harbor
programme.desc: A group of high school students work to restore oysters to New York Harbor.

programme.title: Deadly Seas: The North Atlantic
programme.desc: America's deadliest sea, the North Atlantic claimed over 165 lives in the last ten years. Captain Eddie Welch has survived three hurricanes and a boat sinking.

programme.title: Raw Alaska
programme.desc: An avalanche swallows a skier wearing a helmet camera. A rogue buffalo crushes a man.

programme.title: Racing Extinction
programme.desc: Academy Award-winning documentary filmmaker Louie Psihoyos joins scientists, environmentalists, artists and engineers to draw attention to mankind's role in mass extinction.

programme.title: Serengeti: Conflict
programme.desc: As the Serengeti starts to dry out, competition heats up between the families we met in Episode One. The strong females take center stage, dealing with headstrong males and fighting for the survival of their kin.

programme.title: Serengeti: Invasion
programme.desc: The anticipation of the annual Great Migration is being felt by all of the Serengeti's families as they wait with great desperation for it to arrive. The land continues to get hotter and hunger starts to bite as food becomes even more scarce.

programme.title: Serengeti: Misfortune
programme.desc: The long-awaited arrival of the Great Migration brings opportunities and food in abundance, but it also increases conflict as every one of the Serengeti's families is put to the test.

programme.title: Serengeti: Exodus
programme.desc: The dry season turns the waterhole into a death trap for herds. But for some, this is a gift.

programme.title: Serengeti: Rebirth
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the fire, tensions are high and family members are still missing. Torrential rain brings new life, turning the scorched earth into a green paradise.

programme.title: The Story of Plastic
programme.desc: Aa cohesive timeline of how we got to our current global plastic pollution crisis and how the oil and gas industry has successfully manipulated the narrative around it.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Atlantis of the Andes
programme.desc: Josh dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. During the investigation, Josh discovers multiple structures of the ancient Tiwanaku people including ruins hidden in the lake's depths, dubbed 'the Atlantis of the Andes.'

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: The Johnstons are back with some big life events on the horizon. Trent seeks answers for his ongoing health issues, Liz re-enters the dating scene with Emma not too far behind and Anna is unsure about leaving home after graduation.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Anna Ate My Homework
programme.desc: The Johnstons pamper themselves with mud masks before getting down and dirty at a princess themed mud run. Jonah gives Trent and Amber some devastating news and Trent receives the results from his gallbladder scan.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: We Came From Uranus
programme.desc: The Johnstons pursue their family history with the help of a genealogist and get some unexpected results. Jonah deals with the fallout from being kicked out of college, while Trent and Amber turn to a professional for help.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Back to the Farm: Matt Roloff's Wall

programme.desc: It's a great day for grocery shoppers at Ralph's in Glendale, Calif., as four chefs pay big for those bags. First there's a burrito battle, and then it's a stakeout that'll make Grandma proud. It all comes down to the last chefs standing, and one's toast.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Carnival Eats Feats
programme.desc: Shoppers at Lazy Acres Market in Hermosa Beach, California, make some quick cash as four chefs sift through their carts for ingredients to make their ultimate burger.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat the Judge: Scott
programme.desc: Three Chopped winners with more to prove set out to pull off an upset by taking down Chopped judge Scott Conant. First-round jitters could make the champs' path to another victory more difficult.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Snack Attack
programme.desc: Some creatively presented cheese and a spreadable protein are part of the round one challenge. A strange pink pickle and a crispy, house-made snack food keep the kids on their toes in the entree round.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Two Ranchers and Ree
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making lunch for two of her favourite ranchers, her husband, Ladd, and his dad, Chuck. She starts with her father-in-law's favorite, Chuck's Shrimp Brochettes, and the aptly named Greatest Quesadillas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Hitting the Road
programme.desc: Ree and her daughters are going on a college tour, so she's stocking up the fridge for the guys. She's made them a breakfast burrito kit, Pasta alla ladd, chipotle ranch dressing and cookies and cream cups for a treat.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Essential Cooking Tools
programme.desc: Ree finds some great tools at a local kitchen store to give as a wedding gift. As she purchases the tools, she shares some great dishes she can make with each.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Filling Edna Mae's Freezer
programme.desc: Ree's stocking up the freezer for Ladd's grandmother. Also, on the drive from the ranch to town she's sharing dishes that she's packed to go.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dear Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree's solving time saving quandaries on love, life and what to cook in a time crunch.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Ree Drummond packs a kitchen-equipment care package for her daughter, Alex, working in Dallas. There's a delicious quarter sheet pan supper that's quick to make after a day in the office.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Shipping Cattle
programme.desc: While the family's busy shipping cattle, Ree's whipping up a well-deserved breakfast and getting ahead with dinner. For breakfast, a pancake bar with oven fried bacon, sweet strawberries, vanilla bean caramel sauce, whipped cream and lots of fun toppings.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pizza Masters

programme.desc: Andy teaches a wealthy young man the satisfaction of self-reliance.

programme.desc: Frank runs out of Halloween candy and accidentally gives out condoms.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Lone Barone
programme.desc: When Amy breaks up with Robert, the entire family blames Raymond for the break-up.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Apartment
programme.desc: Raymond is green with envy over Robert's new apartment building and his sexy neighbours.

programme.title: One Day at a Time: Perfect
programme.desc: Alex needs a large amount of money right away, worrying Penelope. Schneider and Avery must contend with an unwanted gift from Dr. Berkowitz.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court
programme.desc: Walden and Alan throw Marty a bachelor party after he proposes to Evelyn, and his best friends help him celebrate his last days of bachelorhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Fingers of Crème de Menthe
programme.desc: Alan learns that Lyndsey broke up with Larry and didn't tell him. Meanwhile, Walden sets out to prove that he's a man's man.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: I Heart Video Dating
programme.desc: Erica and Lainey try to find Bill a woman of interest by using new technology for dating. They recruit Adam to create a demo reel, but Beverly insists she will find someone the old fashioned way.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: George! George Glass!
programme.desc: Erica and Adam both take the lead from TV's 'The Brady Bunch' and 'George Glass' their crushes. Adam risks bodily harm in an intense game of paintball, and Erica might be embarrassed when her friends see through her fake college-aged boyfriend.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Some of My Best Friends Are Portuguese
programme.desc: Shut out once again by the judgemental moms at Ritchie's school, Christine runs into a down-to-earth workingwoman, who invites her over for a drink after work. Belinda's job, however, isn't quite the type of position Christine expected her to hold.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Christine volunteers to help out at Richie's spring carnival and while there, she runs into the mean moms, who are clucking over the attractive father of a new student at Westbridge. Christine is excited to learn that the hot dad is her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Passion of the Christine
programme.desc: Since New Christine broke up with Richard, he's been spending a lot of time at Christine's house, leading Ritchie to believe that his parents are back together. Richard suggests that they give their relationship another try.

programme.desc: When Jessie discovers that Zuri is a chess prodigy, she urges her to compete in a renowned competition. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma suspect that Bertram was once a jewel thief.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: First Kiss
programme.desc: Alex turns back time which gives Justin multiple opportunities to have his first kiss.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: I Almost Drowned in a Chocolate Fountain
programme.desc: Alex's brothers play a trick on her since she uses a magical elf to get her own way.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Who Let the Dogs In

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have Dance Face?
programme.desc: Cami and Delaware try out for the dance team, but when Cami discovers Delaware makes a goofy face when she's dancing, Cami worries that they won't make the team.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Dodge-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Dump-A-Rooney

programme.title: Raven's Home: All Sewn Up

programme.title: Raven's Home: Oh Father, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Nia is excited Devon is going to fly in for her school's daddy/ daughter dance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Fishy Story

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy Gas/ Little Big Ape
programme.desc: When Goofy invents a new fuel to make the roadsters go faster, they wind up with unexpected results. The Happy Helpers try to capture a gorilla that is loose in Clarabelle's house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Wonder-Bob/ Yay, Earth Day!
programme.desc: When Bob's lucky baseball bat breaks, the pups go on a mission to find a new one in time for the championship game. The pugs help a group of lost moles find their way back home!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mystery at the Puppet Show/ The Mystery of the New Kid
programme.desc: Mikku and Chikku go undercover as puppets so they can help Mira catch a pickpocket. When a new kid in town is blamed for stealing an earring, Mira must figure out if he's guilty.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Flipperboobootosis

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Kung Food
programme.desc: Marinette accompanies her famous chef great uncle, Wang, to a cook-off. When Chloe sabotages Wang's dish, he gets akumatized into Kung Food. Those who taste his dishes are transformed into troublemaking terrors for our heroes.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Princess Fragrance
programme.desc: The akumatized Princess Fragrance causes mayhem with her magic perfume, going as far as kidnapping a visiting Prince.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Captive
programme.desc: When Atwater disappears at the house of a convicted felon, the evidence doesn't look promising as his belongings and blood have been left behind. Intelligence rallies to rescue him before it's too late. Atwater struggles for survival.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A gang from El Salvador infiltrates Chicago and Intelligence works with a visiting detective to put an end to the crew's brutal tactics. Antonio finds himself getting close to the Salvadorian detective Marcella Gomez but learns she has a hidden motive.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Anthem
programme.desc: A basketball star is murdered after an anti-police rally and Intelligence navigates a politically charged environment to track the killer. Woods' daughter Brianna gets tangled up in the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sisterhood
programme.desc: Intelligence tracks a vigilante killing rapists. The investigation hits home for Burgess who begins to question if the men who attacked her sister truly paid for their actions.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Profiles
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a series of bombings targeting members of the media and enlists Firehouse 51 to help examine the devices and prevent the next attack.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Breaking Point
programme.desc: When a prominent Alderman known for urban revitalization efforts is killed, Intelligence looks into corruption in the neighborhood. Olinsky feels pressure after receiving an ultimatum from Woods.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ghosts
programme.desc: Upton uses an old undercover identity to help take down a meth ring spearheaded by a former criminal contact. With pressure from Woods mounting, Voight calls in a favor from Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Payback
programme.desc: A string of stash house robberies lead back to an unlikely individual. Voight confronts a key witness in the Bingham investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Saved
programme.desc: Voight witnesses the kidnapping of a young woman with a mysterious connection to his past. Intelligence works to find a connection between her kidnapping and several bank robberies. Ruzek gets a tip that a grand jury has been summoned.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Callen and the team question CIA Agent Taylor's backstory after she escaped from a kidnapping and turns to Callen for help.

programme.title: Dateline: Good and Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at an Anaheim trash facility, a dedicated detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know that search will bring her face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Janet Harrell
programme.desc: When a man is abducted from his front yard, evidence from a taser and a strange car accident lead them to the unlikeliest of suspects.

programme.title: Snapped: Juatasha Denton-McCaster
programme.desc: The mystery of a decapitated corpse leads police to make an unlikely accusation about a college student and her missing husband.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Broken Bonds
programme.desc: A quiet night was shattered when intruders terrorized a Florida couple and their young son, killing one of them. Investigators questioned the initial story. Then, a tip led them to another family with dark secrets, and that's when bonds were tested.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Girl With the Red Shoes
programme.desc: Annie Kasprzak has a second chance at a happy life after being adopted by her case worker. Then, the 15-year-old vanishes. Her parents find a note in her room that reveals a secret Annie has been hiding.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Vampire Clan
programme.desc: Explore cases where investigators uncover and expose the dark world of cults that kill.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Kirtland Murders
programme.desc: Police in Kirtland, Ohio receive a tip about a family of five killed and buried in a barn belonging to a local cult. As they question the cult, investigators learn even more sinister details of power and manipulation leading up to the murders.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Killers of Rulo
programme.desc: After hearing about a religious cult stockpiling weapons on an isolated farm outside Rulo, Nebraska, FBI agents cultivate an informant from inside the group who details the torture and murder being ordered by the group's diabolical leader.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Palo Mayombe
programme.desc: After crossing the Mexican Border from Brownsville, Texas, a student out on spring break goes missing. The investigation leads US officials to a cult known for practicing witchcraft led by a former male model and a high school cheerleader.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Kelly and Yolanda head to Dickson County, Tennessee, to look for new clues that may help solve the 1998 murder of a likeable grocery store owner.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Room #10
programme.desc: The Cold Justice team returns to Fort Myers, FL to put their investigative skills to work on a 22-year-old murder case of a woman found shot in the head, covered in bloody sheets and dumped behind a community rec center.

programme.title: Snapped: Misook Wang
programme.desc: While a community searches for a missing businesswoman, police uncover a shocking dispute with a money-hungry relative that they hope will lead them to a killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Whitney Harris
programme.desc: A young mother claims she was caught up in her boyfriend’s murderous plan.

programme.title: Snapped: Diane Staudte
programme.desc: They say deaths come in three, but when a young woman falls ill after eerily similar deaths of her father and brother, suspicion turns to a family member and the limits of a mother’s love.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Collision Course
programme.desc: When Scrat accidentally sets of a chain of events that cause a meteor storm to head toward Earth, it is up to the old gang to save the planet. Sid, Manny, and Diego go on an epic adventure to find clues to stop the meteor and save the world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Two Cars in Every Garage and Three Eyes on Every Fish

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Tree Hugger

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Squirt and the Whale

programme.title: The Simpsons: Opposites A-Frack
programme.desc: Lisa brings in Assemblywoman Maxine Lombard to put a stop to Mr. Burns' fracking operation, but is taken aback when the two political opponents find themselves attracted to one another.

programme.title: Family Guy: HTTPete

programme.desc: Archer tries to find out who killed his partner, but accidentally gets in bed with Mother, a notorious L.A. crime boss.

programme.desc: When Scrat accidentally sets of a chain of events that cause a meteor storm to head toward Earth, it is up to the old gang to save the planet. Sid, Manny, and Diego go on an epic adventure to find clues to stop the meteor and save the world.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
programme.desc: After his grandfather mysteriously dies, Jake finds clues to a place known as Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children. As he gets to know the residents, all of whom have special abilities, the Home is attacked by a group of powerful enemies.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep

programme.title: Amazon Underworld
programme.desc: Follow the animals of the Amazon as they adapt to their ever-changing home and struggle to survive.

programme.title: Wild Galapagos
programme.desc: Join National Geographic's Pristine Seas as they explore the exciting, complex and unique waters of the Galapagos Islands.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Examine the paradox of whales, penguins, iguanas and dolphins that inherited a burdensome legacy from their land-dwelling ancestors: they must breathe in open air.

programme.title: Extreme Alaska: Denali National Park
programme.desc: Brutally cold winters these landscapes are full of hidden wonders & struggle for survival.

programme.title: America's Greatest Animals
programme.desc: Twelve animals with amazing characteristics are nominated as America's greatest but only five will be worthy of the honour.

programme.title: The Last Lions
programme.desc: From the lush wetlands of Botswana's Okavango Delta comes the suspense-filled tale of a determined lioness ready to try anything, and to risk everything, to keep her family alive.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wolf Dynasty: The Pack
programme.desc: Inside stories behind the experiments of bringing wolves back to Yellowstone.

programme.title: Born in Africa: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Every day brings new moments of failure and success for Africa’s baby predators.

programme.title: Rare: Creatures of the Photo Ark
programme.desc: Joel Sartore documents threatened species in the wild, at zoos and in nature preserves. The world’s rare and at-risk mammals, fish, amphibians, birds, reptiles and insects.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Jesus Relics
programme.desc: New investigations into mysterious holy relics could reveal fresh answers to Jesus's greatest mysteries, and using the latest archaeological methods, experts might be closer than we think.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Legend of the Turin Shroud
programme.desc: The Turin Shroud is believed to be the burial cloth of Jesus and proof of his existence, but skeptics disagree. Experts investigate this ancient relic to determine if the shroud is genuine, or one of the most elaborate hoaxes in history.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Doomsday Forest
programme.desc: When mysterious structures are discovered deep in a remote forest, experts investigate if this strange site was the long-lost birthplace of a top-secret Nazi project that produced some of the deadliest weapons the world had ever seen.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Retiree Alex Strategos moves to Florida to be closer to his son, but loneliness consumes him. He turns to internet dating and finds 69 year-old Melissa, but is soon struck by a rush of unexplained illnesses.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: After a teenage house party spirals out of control, a shocking photo goes viral around the local schools. A vicious campaign of cyber bullying ensues that drives an innocent girl to take desperate action.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Diabolical: Hands That Rob the Cradle
programme.desc: In early 1980, two eerily similar crimes occur 400 miles apart. They both leave young mother dead and an infant child stolen. Years later, police unravel a plot so cold-blooded, it leaves everyone even seasoned homicide detectives in utter shock.

programme.title: Diabolical: Devil Wears False Eyelashes
programme.desc: Three men die over a span of a dozen years, with no suspicion of wrongdoing and no files charged. But when a deadly car explosion rips through downtown Pensacola, Florida, a new investigation begins. And all suspicion points toward just one person.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Without a Trace
programme.desc: In 2007, young mother Melissa Flores vanished without a trace. Seven years later, police arrested her ex, Ronnie Denny Jr. Even though her body was never found, Denny was convicted of murder, but his family is convinced the system got it wrong.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Diabolical: Devil Wears False Eyelashes
programme.desc: Three men die over a span of a dozen years, with no suspicion of wrongdoing and no files charged. But when a deadly car explosion rips through downtown Pensacola, Florida, a new investigation begins. And all suspicion points toward just one person.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Without a Trace
programme.desc: In 2007, young mother Melissa Flores vanished without a trace. Seven years later, police arrested her ex, Ronnie Denny Jr. Even though her body was never found, Denny was convicted of murder, but his family is convinced the system got it wrong.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Family Curse
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take a dark turn. Soon small lies and thievery give way to a global crime spree where the twins exploit the vulnerabilities of others in a cruel and twisted game.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Bad Seeds
programme.desc: Robert and Stephen Spahalski are identical twins that terrorized upstate New York: one twin was put behind bars for murder and the other became a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Jeckyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside; when Alexandra Drake is shot in the face, she manages to tell police it was accidental but Kenda isn't so sure he believes her.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Time Bomb
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes at the Pikes Peak National Bank, it's up to rookie detective Joe Kenda catch the culprits.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped. Then Kenda is nearly stumped when a group of teens discover human bones on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: .357 Magnum
programme.desc: Blood evidence is used in investigating the shooting death of a firearms enthusiast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda's only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition. Then a 29-year-old man moves back to Colorado Springs, but at his welcome home party he winds up shot execution-style.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Primal Instinct
programme.desc: When a drunken dispute at a biker bar turns deadly, Kenda must launch a manhunt for a pair of suspects who fled with a small boy in tow. Then a man is murdered in an onslaught of high caliber gunfire, but an unexpected break turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. When the witnesses are unable to provide any solid leads, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William's circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A popular army vet is found bleeding to death on the cold asphalt of a shadowy parking lot -his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. A gruesome clue leads Kenda's team to an unlikely killer whose motive for murder is as heartless.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Married to the Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife. Kathy winds up overhearing him being shot at, leading her to grapple with the terrifying realities of being married to a cop.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home after a day spent helping friends move apartments. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it's up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Blackout Killers
programme.desc: Two serial killers take advantage of the blackouts in Nazi Germany and Britain that were meant to defend against enemy bombing.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill it's Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Yardcore: Stunning Spanish Courtyard
programme.desc: Adding their own prerequisite zing to iconic Spanish-styled architecture, the Yardcore crew goes to town to bring two sisters an amazing courtyard custom made for outdoor living.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Mediterranean Oasis
programme.desc: Allen and Lily's uninviting yard is haggard and ignored, so Matt comes to their rescue with a Mediterranean oasis design. They want a place to hang out with friends and family so Matt gives them a large deck with a reclaimed dining table.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Rock Pond Living Space
programme.desc: A dirt pile of a backyard with an old shed and dying plants is transformed into an entertainer's dream. An unused space quickly becomes everyone's hangout when a cascading rock pond takes center stage.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Hamptons Hangout
programme.desc: This dark and uninviting yard has these homeowners staying indoors. Mark delivers a design that will allow them to live outdoors. He installs a multi-tiered deck with dining table, a patio with a fire pit and sofa, as well as beach seating and a bar.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Modern Party Pad
programme.desc: The team transforms a barren patio space into a modern hangout. What was once a deck and dirt landscape gets a modified shade structure, steel water feature, living wall and bocce court. We add green plants and a metal fire feature to create a party pad.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Snake River Showpiece
programme.desc: Garth and his team brave sub-freezing temperatures in Idaho to build a $590k multi-level deck with four distinct living areas. The indoor-outdoor space features a pizza oven, a mezzanine-level bar overlooking the Snake River and an infrared sauna.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Luxury Deck with a Dog Staircase
programme.desc: Newlyweds Whitney and Joey have just purchased their dream home in an exclusive gated community, but the existing deck has some serious issues. It's old, rotting and doesn't fit their needs. Plus, their aging dog is having trouble using the stairs.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cajun Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Texas and Louisiana to feast on classic Cajun cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Roger travels across Massachusetts to meet two chefs who are putting a brand new spin on fire-roasted, rotisserie chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Food Traditions
programme.desc: Roger visits New England for two unique food traditions that celebrate family, friends and the community.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Love for Lobsters in Maine
programme.desc: In Maine, the love for lobsters runs deep and Roger visits two places where lobsters are cooked in the coolest, wood-fired cookers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Foods in Jamaica
programme.desc: The search for fire and food takes us to Jamaica where we make a beeline for Scotchies's Too, a restaurant famous for cooking jerk pork and chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap

programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to Africa to get up close and personal with a distant relative and scale dangerous cliffs all to answer where humans came from.

programme.desc: A giant crocodile whose neck is trapped in a small motorcycle tire has captured the world's attention. Animal expert Forrest Galante travels to Indonesia to take on the ultimate challenge of saving its life.

programme.title: Great Global Clean Up
programme.desc: Zac Efron and filmmaker Zach King join the people and organizations who have made it their mission to clean up the planet. With innovations in recycling and next-level waste management, these superstars are making a global impact with their local efforts.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Earth Day
programme.desc: Josh interviews guests and experts about preserving the Earth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Josh heads to the jungles of Central America to investigate the legendary crystal skull that was discovered by a renowned adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones. Josh probes whether the skull is a lost relic or archaeology's tallest tale.

programme.title: Nostradamus Decoded
programme.desc: Take a look at the mystery of Nostradamus as they tackle the fascinating questions and expose the truth about the world's greatest prognosticator and offer insight into human nature.

programme.title: Epic Private Islands
programme.desc: These epic private islands are personal paradises. From a private Florida Key with a pier that cost half a million bucks to a Frank Lloyd Wright house with a rooftop helipad, to a 3000 acre nature preserve in Wisconsin.

programme.title: Epic RVs
programme.desc: With epic price tags over the million dollar mark, these awesome RVs have been transformed into mobile man-caves and mansions.

programme.title: Epic Tech Homes
programme.desc: These are the smartest homes ever; they follow voice commands and talk back, automatically trap intruders, feed the cat, shut out the sunlight or turn on a hot tub, all by themselves.

programme.title: Epic Backyards
programme.desc: Backyards have gone epic, turning home turf into mega resorts. From pro race tracks to full sport courts, zip lines and underwater caves or replicas of famous baseball parks, these guys are creating their own fields of dreams at any cost.

programme.title: Epic Beach Homes
programme.desc: The ocean is everywhere in and around these Epic Beach Homes. With two story windows, outdoor showers and indoor rivers, these owners make the most of their breathtaking views and water's edge locations while fending off floods and hurricanes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: Avid outdoorsman Trenton and novice survivalist Jen take on high elevation in the peaks of Udhampur, India. With relentlessly cold nights and an unexpected wildfire, their chances of surviving the 21-day challenge might go up in flames.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Strength in Pain
programme.desc: An adventuress and a wilderness instructor take on the Honduras rainforest. They survive punishing storms and frigid nights, but a terrifying, close encounter with a deadly snake brings this pair to the breaking point.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Mayan Sacrifice
programme.desc: Luke, a go-getter from Southern California, and Alyssa, a positive survival instructor, take on the rugged coast of the Yucatan. They sruggle to survive dehydration, hunger, and the threat of caiman.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Colombian Conflict
programme.desc: Charlie, a no-nonsense New Yorker, and Danielle, a nature-loving vegetarian, attempt to survive for 21 days in the deadly Colombian jungle. With polar opposite personalities, will Charlie and Danielle work as a team, or will the jungle tear them apart?

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: What the Duck?
programme.desc: In Mexico's unforgiving, cenote-covered landscape, two fan survivalists are dropped on an island filled with venomous coral snakes, territorial jaguars, blood-sucking chiquistas and a duck named Henry that they desperately want to eat for dinner.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alligator Alley
programme.desc: One Army mom and one Marine are shipped out to the sweltering swamps of the Florida Everglades where they will put their military survival training to the test, facing 8-foot alligators, venomous water moccasins, and bloodthirsty mosquitoes.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Maja's Story
programme.desc: Maja moves to Houston to undertake a difficult weight-loss journey with the support of her boyfriend Christian. But when Christian decides he's had enough and leaves Maja high and dry, she will discover that the only person she can count on is herself.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Leneatha's Story
programme.desc: For 23 years, Leneatha has worked as a pharmacy tech at a local hospital. Now, she has a young daughter to support, but she's so big that it's hard to move. If Dr. Now can't help her stop eating, losing her job could be the least of her worries.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: David/ Benji and Erica
programme.desc: Erica is succeeding on her weight loss journey, when romantic misfortune sends her spiraling backwards. Benji Bolton must reach his goal weight without the support of his brother David, after a disagreement leaves the two brothers estranged.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Alicia's Story
programme.desc: A devoted girlfriend and loving aunt, Alicia is all smiles and laughter on the outside, but on the inside she is terrified that her addiction to food will kill her before she can marry her long-time love or watch her nieces grow up.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: David/ Benji and Erica
programme.desc: Erica is succeeding on her weight loss journey, when romantic misfortune sends her spiraling backwards. Benji Bolton must reach his goal weight without the support of his brother David, after a disagreement leaves the two brothers estranged.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Alicia's Story
programme.desc: A devoted girlfriend and loving aunt, Alicia is all smiles and laughter on the outside, but on the inside she is terrified that her addiction to food will kill her before she can marry her long-time love or watch her nieces grow up.

programme.title: Skin Tight: Mikki and Denise
programme.desc: After losing 275lbs, Mikki became a fitness fanatic, but the weight loss left her with a lot of sagging skin. Denise's obesity always made her feel invisible, but after losing 200lbs the skin still hinders her from fitting in with her outgoing family.

programme.title: Skin Tight: Sal and Rebecca
programme.desc: Rebecca lost her weight to be more active with her young son, but the plan backfired because she's now trapped in her excess skin. After his dad died, Sal dropped a ton of weight, but with all the excess skin, he fears he will never become a dad.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: It's Been Pretty Tough
programme.desc: As new parents, Jeremy and Audrey face many unexpected, emotional challenges. Zach and Tori attempt to sleep train Jackson and Matt gets looks for a fun solution. Amy's birthday approaches and surprises await.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: There's No Plan B
programme.desc: As Matt struggles to get everything set for pumpkin season, Jeremy and Zach juggle their duties as fathers with their farm responsibilities. Meanwhile, Amy must negotiate selling her baked goods at the farm and the new pirate ship may be a money pit.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Yo Shawty!
programme.desc: As a new year of school beings, Jonah has an LP lady friend visit to see if romance will bloom. Trent and Amber discuss opening a furniture shop.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The Grass is Always Cheaper
programme.desc: Jamie's entire garden is made up solely of silk flowers. Now, she aims to replace her whole lawn with artificial grass, to eliminate her landscaping bill. Justin tries to land a job in sales, where he promises to save his employer tons of dough.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Home is Where the Cart Is
programme.desc: Flight attendant Steffanie takes her boyfriend to the Unclaimed Baggage Center in hopes of pushing their relationship to the next level. Professional doorman RJ Andrews has no fixed address but lives rent-free by house sitting 365 days a year.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt
programme.desc: Patriarch Raul Pinto scours through vacuum canisters at the car wash in hopes of finding spare change. Kia Cambridge limits herself to one piece of gum, every three days.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Nobody Pays Retail
programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens
programme.desc: The O'Briens refuse to buy anything new, and instead find ingenious ways of fixing their broken belongings. Aimee's total net worth is $5.3 million, but she refuses to spend more than $1,000 a month.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Black Market Baby Dealer
programme.desc: In the 1950s and 1960s, a doctor named Thomas Hicks illegally sold over 200 babies on the black market. Now, lead investigator, Jane Blasio, is working to reunite stolen babies with biological families while trying to unearth secrets about Hicks himself.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Forced Delivery
programme.desc: Jane discovers a suspicious pattern of babies with extremely low birth weights coming out of the clinic. Chris makes a discovery of his own, Dr. Hicks may have hidden birth records in his mausoleum. Diane hopes to meet her biological father.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Mausoleum Break-in
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa meet the first Hicks baby, Stephen Dilbeck. They work to find his family and solve the mystery of why Hicks sold that first baby. Chris and Dr. Hicks' granddaughter Sallie bust open the mausoleum in search of birth records.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Unexpected Revelations
programme.desc: After 70 years of searching, Stephen Dilbeck gets some shocking information about his birth family from Jane and Lisa. Meanwhile, Chris and Sallie work on getting approval of an exhumation that will answer questions for hundreds of Hicks babies.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Buried Truth
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa share the news about the exhumation with a group of Hicks Babies that have questioned whether Dr. Hicks was in fact their biological father. Sallie faces the reality of exhuming her father. The exhumation begins.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyga
programme.desc: Rapper Tyga laughs with Rob as guys get nutted in 'Rack City,' bad drivers think they 'Found a Spot' and innocent victims get painfully close to sneakers in 'Check Out My Kicks.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXXVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the suck zone, meet some animals that are hungry for human, and put on their hard hats for a little funsctruction.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Penn Jillette
