programme.title: Ridiculousness: Pauly D
programme.desc: DJ Pauly D of MTV's 'Jersey Shore' stops by the studio to help weed out some 'Jersey Shore Rejects' and show us what a little 'Guy Touching and Laughing' is all about.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get bent out of shape in ‘hinge cringe’, get trapped in a ‘giggle prison’, and take a visit to the angriest place on earth, ‘swing city’.

programme.title: The Challenge: Karma Chameleon
programme.desc: Bear seeks to prove that no one can extinguish the fire that he has burning for Kailah. Ashley and Mattie get into a heated argument. The players compete in the freezing 'Cold War’ challenge, which proves too chilling for one player.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Jon II
programme.desc: Rapper-producer Lil Jon joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to end the party in 'Turn Down for This', have the hardest Christmas ever in 'Merry Crunk-mas', and to say 'I do' in 'Unique Proposals'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nick Young

programme.title: Live PD: Wanted
programme.desc: Audience members help law enforcement agencies across the country track down fugitives.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Pushed to the Limit

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Uncool and the Gang
programme.desc: What was Sal's fear when Joe poured water in his mouth blindfolded? What punishmnet had producers so scared, they doubled security.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Training Day
programme.desc: What does Joe do every morning before work? And where was Q employed before becoming a fireman?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Footloose
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal call out bizarre names while working the front desk of an office, and tonight's loser gets up close and personal with some strange feet.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: It's Personal With Amy Hoggart: Grief
programme.desc: Amy Hoggart goes to absurd lengths to untangle people's life issues like shame and grief.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Everything's Just Rosie
programme.desc: How many pounds of potatoes were made for the famous Scoopski Potatoes challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek

programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later, they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus, tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside the Vault
programme.desc: The guys meet after the show to talk about their favourite moments during the show, not to mention the most uncomfortable, most embarrassing, most humiliating and most outrageous. Viewers get a chance to hear all about the behind-the-scenes mishaps.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: The guys give a taste of their awkward customer service at a liquor store, take tickets of humiliation at a deli counter and try to get signatures to recognize phony holidays. Tonight’s losers pay a frigid price in a cold-hearted double punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: O Grayson, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Todd and Julie's plans for a peaceful weekend go awry. Chase tries to spend some bonding time with Grayson, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Matchmakers and Batchbakers
programme.desc: Todd and Julie try to find Savannah the perfect match when she jumps back into the dating pool. Meanwhile, Grayson enters a baking contest.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dancing Tween
programme.desc: Grayson is invited to his first dance and Todd and Julie are conflicted about him growing up. Meanwhile, Todd puts Savannah's and Nanny Faye's driving skills to the test in Savannah's new ride.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moms Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: When Todd refuses to celebrate anyone but Faye for Mother's Day, Julie and Lindsie make their own plans. Todd is forced to babysit Jackson but struggles with Lindsie's new age parenting.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: When Todd offers to be a chauffeur for Faye and her sister Francis, he gets more than he bargained for. Meanwhile, Julie opens a boutique real estate office, but things go awry when she offers to sell Savannah's house.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Prank Master
programme.desc: When Savannah decides to drop out of college Todd hatches a plan to get her back in class. Meanwhile Nanny Faye works overtime to pull an epic prank on Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Remission Control
programme.desc: The Chrisley's take it to the gutter with a family bowling tournament. And while Julie waits to hear if her cancer is in remission, the family plans a surprise for her.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Differing Strokes
programme.desc: Todd and Chase team up for a not so friendly golf match against Jay Demarcus. And Savannah attempts to move in with Nanny Faye only to discover there's no room at the inn!

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaways and Segways
programme.desc: Todd and Savannah butt heads while planning a fashion show for charity. Meanwhile, Chase helps Nanny Faye apply for a job as a Segway tour guide to win a bet with Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Boys to Men
programme.desc: Todd highjacks Chase's 21st birthday plans and forces some father/son bonding time on him. Meanwhile, Julie tries to get Grayson ready for football tryouts but knows nothing about football.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Animal House
programme.desc: Todd gets more than he bargained for when he offers to watch a house full of children. And Julie struggles to let her hair down on a girls' weekend.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Tantrums and Tiaras
programme.desc: Grayson's dream to visit Universal Orlando's Volcano Bay is in jeopardy when his parents work gets in the way.

programme.title: The Funny Dance Show: I'm Funny and I Know It
programme.desc: Comedians Jackie Tohn and Solomon Georgio face off against London Brown and Sherry Cola in a comedy dance battle to win $10,000 for charity. It's raining men, and a pair of mismatched superheroes tries to save the day.

programme.title: The Funny Dance Show: Pump Up The Ham
programme.desc: Comedians, Jade Catta-Preta and Marcella Arguello face off against Daniel Franzese and Irene Choi in a comedy dance battle to win $10,000 for charity. A boy band rips at each other's hearts while some fly old folks bust a move.

programme.title: The Funny Dance Show: Backstreet’s NOT Back, Alright?
programme.desc: Comedians Mary Lynn Rajskub and Matt Richards face off against Parvesh Cheena and Hana Mae Lee in a comedy dance battle to win $10,000 for charity. A Boss Ass Bitch and a Big Spender wanna dance with somebody but can't keep their hands to themselves.

programme.title: The Funny Dance Show: Dance Party up in Here
programme.desc: Comedians Fortune Feimster and Willie Hunter face off against Fahim Anwar and Becky Robinson in a comedy dance battle to win $10,000 for charity. Fortune's Milkshake attempts to bring all the boys to the yard, while Becky flips for Fahim.

programme.title: The Funny Dance Show: I'd Do Anything for Laughs (Including That)
programme.desc: Comedians Ron Funches and Blair Socci go head to head with Adam Ray and Brad Williams in a comedy dance battle to win $10,000 for charity. Ron's video vixen hits the scene, while Brad and Adam's bromance takes a shocking turn.

programme.title: The Funny Dance Show: Just Dance, or at Least Try
programme.desc: Comedians Yamaneika Saunders and Jeremiah Watkins face off against Carly Jibson and Kel Mitchell in a $10,000 comedy dance battle for charity. Things get down and dirty at Prom and two talented plumbers struggle to freek-a-leek.

programme.title: Total Bellas: A Bella Bachelorette
programme.desc: Nikki plans the bachelorette of her dreams with her family and friends in Paris fit for a classy queen; however, Brie has other plans to liven up the party. Meanwhile, Nikki tries to hide her emotions and anxiety about her wedding to John Cena.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Paris Bachelorette Part Deux
programme.desc: Nikki's Paris bachelorette continues and Brie pulls out all the stops to throw a grand masquerade ball to prove that Brie-mom is just as much fun as Brie-mode. Meanwhile, Daniel Bryan finally learns the fate of his career with WWE.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Follow Your Heart
programme.desc: On the season finale, the Bella twins jet off to New Orleans for an electrifying WrestleMania where Daniel Bryan makes his long-awaited return to the WWE ring.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Brave New Bellas
programme.desc: The Bella Twins are back and better than ever. Nicole's steamy romance with her 'Dancing with the Stars' partner, Artem Chigvintsev, hits a roadblock after family and friends’ question if they're moving too fast.

programme.title: Total Bellas: The Book of Bella
programme.desc: Brie and Nicole's upcoming book and decision to reconnect with their estranged father opens up old wounds and starts a major conflict with their mother, Kathy.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Bellas Without Borders
programme.desc: Brie and Nicole's decision to visit their father in Mexicali forces their mother, Kathy, to come to terms with one of the darkest parts of her family's past. Nicole and Brie take Artem on a tour of their hometown, Brawley.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Team Games
programme.desc: Dynamic duos are taking over Flavortown Market to show they have the teamwork skills to take on Guy Fieri's games.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Guys
programme.desc: Four chefs from four of Guy Fieri's own restaurants face off in two rounds of culinary combat. Guy kicks things off by challenging his guys to make their best burger without any key ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Iron Chef Challenge
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings three GGG winners back to compete against each other for a chance to go up against GGG's most feared competitor and judge, Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Eggs-treme Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri isn't a fan of eggs, but that may change when he brings four egg-ceptional chefs to Flavortown for a culinary competition all about eggs.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Behind the Games: Guy's Superstar Grocery Games: Part 3
programme.desc: The games continue as the six remaining celebrity chefs pair up into teams to navigate through Guy Fieri's most terrifying game yet. In round two, the chefs must switch gears and go from savory to sweet as they make their best dessert.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Five-Dollar Price Check

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Drop the Mic
programme.desc: Chopped's Amanda Freitag and comedian Jo Koy show up to boo Bobby Flay out of his kitchen. They invite Washington, D.C.'s Ryan Hackney and Nora Haron from the California Bay Area to bring their kitchen skills to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Lady Butchers
programme.desc: Meat enthusiast Courtney Rada and Iron Chef Michael Symon source Cleveland chefs Penny Barend and Melissa Khoury to bring Bobby Flay down. These lady butchers are ready to slice and dice the competition.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The View from the Top
programme.desc: Food Network's Michael Symon gets help from The View's Sunny Hostin as they try to cut Bobby Flay down to size. New York chef Pom Amaritnant duels with Chef Troy Gagliardo from North Carolina for a chance to dethrone the king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All Dried Out Over You
programme.desc: Chef Anne Burrell and actor and cookbook author David Burtka dig deep for two powerful chefs that can take down Bobby Flay. Australian chef Rachael Polhill and Chef Ian Redshaw from Charlottesville, Va., are here to ensure victory is served.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Sugarcoat It
programme.desc: Best Baker's Marcela Valladolid pairs up with the Cake Boss himself, Buddy Valastro, to try and score a sweet victory against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: BBF: Beat my Best Friend
programme.desc: Food Network's Michael Symon enlists his pal, TV host Clinton Kelly, to distract Bobby Flay with their friendship. They get additional help from a French master, Chef Sylvain Delpique, and an Italian bread master, Chef Jackie Mazza.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Blast From The Past
programme.desc: Bobby Flay is haunted when Food Network's Amanda Freitag and Katie Lee bring two ghosts from his past to the arena.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Crazy Calls
programme.desc: After getting their first-ever answering machines, Murray and Pop-Pop wage a message war on one another. Fed up, Erica, Barry and Pops try to stop the fighting by offering a trip to a hockey game as an olive branch.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Stevie King
programme.desc: Adam’s love of Stephen King inspires him to try his hand at horror writing. After learning the monster in Adam’s story is based on Beverly, she forces Adam to stay in on Halloween and rewrite it.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Answer Is Maybe
programme.desc: Richard tells Christine that the reason he has good luck with women is that he 'says yes to life.' When Christine meets a good-looking man after paying a visit to New Christine, she breaks out of her mold and says yes when he asks her out to dinner.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Come to Papa Jeff
programme.desc: When Christine's parents can't make it to Grandparent's Day at Ritchie's school, New Christine suggests that Jeff, the new man in Christine's life, go as Ritchie's special friend. Christine then learns that Jeff really is a grandfather.

programme.desc: Ritchie returns from a church festival with Richard and new Christine with a newfound interest in religion. Christine, who once had a bad experience at church, re-examines her beliefs and with Ritchie and Matthew in tow, decides to give God another go.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Alligator Showdown
programme.desc: Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett investigate a man raising alligators in the attic of his home. As night falls over the White Mountains, Officers Glenn Lucas and Eric Fluette ascend into the darkness to rescue a lost group of hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Officers Arsenault confronts a hunter accused of hunting too close to a school and damaging property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Room for Error
programme.desc: Officer Lopashanski makes a surprising discovery while searching an island for an injured bald eagle. Officers Cheney and Pushee stumble upon a trespasser whose vehicle is stuck in a mud hole. Officer MacFadzen leads the search for a missing swimmer.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The dive team assists at an event in Hampton Beach, while Officer Courtney patrols the area's clam flats. Officers Hannett and Holmes patrol snowmobile activity across the state. And Officer Demler helps a bobcat that's been injured by a porcupine.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Nothing to Hide
programme.desc: Officer Jim Cyrs and Lt. Saunders rush to the scene of an ATV accident. Officer James Benvenuti works with K-9 Cora to track down a suspect. Officer Eric Hannett gets backup from Lieutenant Bill Boudreau when dealing with a suspicious fisherman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Schoolyard Bear
programme.desc: Officer Chris McKee attempts to remove a bear from a tree in a playground, while Officer Fluette picks out his new K9 partner. Officer Lucas searches for a group of ATVs. On the snowy summit of Mt. Washington, officers search for lost hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Warden Warriors
programme.desc: The Wardens use night vision to catch night hunters and poachers. Then, Warden Laflamme must take matters into his own hands to protect the public from a tragic outcome.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Gun Country
programme.desc: One team of wardens investigate the shooting of a turkey hunter that could be an attempted homicide while another team sets up a stakeout.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Room for Error
programme.desc: Officer Lopashanski makes a surprising discovery while searching an island for an injured bald eagle. Officers Cheney and Pushee stumble upon a trespasser whose vehicle is stuck in a mud hole. Officer MacFadzen leads the search for a missing swimmer.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mysteries in the Moose State
programme.desc: Some of the wardens enter the annual moose-hunting lottery. Meanwhile, Craven tracks down the mythical Main mountain lion and the wardens try to find an elderly man lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Dogs
programme.desc: Excited hunters are in the woods because spring turkey hunting season has arrived. Laflamme investigates whether someone may have poached a hen. Spahr responds to a call where a girl was attacked by a dog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Life on the Border
programme.desc: Up in the North Woods along the Canadian border, things are very different. A warden looking for smugglers encounters a drunk driver with a gun, and a suicidal man enters the woods with a shotgun.

programme.title: North Woods Law: To Serve and Protect
programme.desc: The game wardens are guardians of Maine's wildlife, but they also protect the public. Warden Carter must find an injured bear. A search is mounted for a missing man in the woods. Wardens MacCabe and Stevens track down hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Moose Chase
programme.desc: With the arrival of fall comes the great Maine moose season. Warden MacCabe goes on a six day hunt and takes you along for the ride. Also, wardens investigate a double moose kill, one of the worst wildlife crimes there is.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dirty Habits
programme.desc: Parker investigates a rotting bear carcass that was dumped on the side of the road, leading him on a hunt across Maine to find a potential poacher. Blanchard catches a couple behaving badly on a wildlife refuge. Robertson rescues some ducklings.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind
programme.desc: When Maine's wildlife wanders into human territory, it's game wardens to the rescue. Wardens Marquis and Fitzpatrick try to catch a dumpster-diving bear. A wily woodchuck gives Warden Lounder a run for his money.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Can't Believe Your Eyes
programme.desc: Whether it's protecting wildlife or ensuring public safety, the Maine Game Wardens are on double duty during the summer. Warden Jeremy Judd tries to rescue a baby skunk in distress. Wardens MacCabe and Robertson investigate a stolen ATV that disappeared.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Excuses, Excuses
programme.desc: Hunting season heats up as Warden Herring calls in the air wing to track illegal activity on a game preserve. Warden Blanchard catches an intentional violator red-handed. Wardens Carter and McBrine execute a search warrant on a known poacher.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Homecoming
programme.desc: The game wardens bring closure at long last to one of the most confounding mysteries in Maine Warden Service history. They later reflect on their years of service.

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to unmask an invisible predator that's dragging fisherman to their deaths.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home, Roscoe Jenkins
programme.desc: A successful Los Angeles talk show host heads home to the Deep South to reunite with his family. Once there, he learns how easy it is fall back into old rivalries.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Not on My Watch
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars become a house divided when a Confederate Civil War knife marches into the shop. Rick and Chumlee are presented with a 1936 Rolex formerly owned by infamous conman Bernie Madoff.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: A man brings Robert E. Lee's silver spoon and Ulysses S. Grant's meerschaum pipe. A shoe from the legendary Triple Crown racehorse Secretariat gallops in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: An antique professional gambler's toolkit may help the team capture a glimpse of the Old West. The team looks at some rare American currency, and a man hopes to sell his 1950s radiation detecting Geiger counter.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hole in One
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare to fire when an 1830s musket made by Eli Whitney (the inventor of the cotton-gin) shoots into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Guns Blazing
programme.desc: One of the rarest guns in American history turns up at the shop. It's a race to the finish when a tire signed by legendary NASCAR driver Dale Earnhardt rolls on by.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Just Shoe It
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee check out a massive collection of Nike shoes.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Saddle Up
programme.desc: An Abraham Lincoln poster used in his 1864 re-election campaign during the Civil War comes up for grabs. Then, Chumlee gets excited when a Turbo Man action figure comes into the shop. Chumlee's plan for a hike with the guys turns into a day on horseback.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fiesta Loco
programme.desc: A Monet landscape gets brought into the shop, as well as an old firefighter station. Next, Rick gets a history lesson on Cinco de Mayo.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum Fever
programme.desc: Two antique telephones are checked out. Then, Rick spots a rare porcelain bowl made during the Ch'ien dynasty. Later, Chumlee refuses to leave work even though he doesn't feel well.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Underground Pawn
programme.desc: Rick checks out a first edition book about the Underground Railroad from the 1800's. Then, he gets his hands on a full set of baseball cards that were only ever handed out to troops during Desert Shield.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: G.I. Pawn
programme.desc: Two rare G.I. Joe playsets, a 1950s Chinese military motorcycle, a photograph and letter signed by poet Henry Wadsworth Longfellow, and an antique Black and Decker drill.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Double Your Pawn
programme.desc: Harry Carey's collection of nearly 200 celebrity autographs; a 1900s Wrigley Gum vending machine; a measuring device known as a railroad equilibristat; a 1960s Jimmy Jet toy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning Pistols
programme.desc: A pair of Duck's Foot pistols, a bar of Yellow Kid soap from an 1896 newspaper comic, a Vicotrian-era hand crank device.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Balloon Payments
programme.desc: Rick may cross the line when he calls in a surprise expert for an appraisal on a Ronald McDonald balloon inflator. Chum pursues an antique RCA inkwell, while Corey sets his sights on a vintage spear.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: E Equals MC Pawn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars make calculated moves when some handwritten math by Albert Einstein could multiply their profits. Chumlee tries to prove he isn't dim when he pays big bucks to have an antique headlamp tester shining brightly once again.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: By Land or By Seep
programme.desc: Rick thinks about taking a big risk and removing six Picasso etchings from a renowned illustrated edition of 'Lysistrata.' Chumlee checks out some vintage ThunderCats toys from the 1980s. Rick and Corey debate about bringing an amphibious jeep off land.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Big Fish in a Small Pawn
programme.desc: Rick tackles a set of San Francisco 49ers Super Bowl rings with a high asking price. Then, Rick and Corey check out a spear gun.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pistol Is Mightier Than the Sword
programme.desc: Rick checks out a sword-pistol combo from the 1700s. A portrait of John Barrymore, the famous film and theatre actor, may be worth a buy. Rick learns about an antique navigational timepiece from the 19th century. Corey's excited about a 1969 Harley.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Across the Pawn'd
programme.desc: Rick travels to England to test out antique weapons. Afterwards, Corey examines an item that inspired a classic movie while Rick looks at a car that belonged to Winston Churchill.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: How It's Made: Underwater Flying Boat
programme.desc: A new, innovative boat offers a one-of-a-kind travel experience as it seamlessly dives beneath the waves and flies over them. Access to the factory floor reveals the expert engineering and cutting-edge technology required to build them.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Animal Nature
programme.desc: When a young woman is found mysteriously slaughtered on the steps of a trailer, Kenda and the homicide team must track down the vile perpetrators responsible for a horrifying string of cold-blooded murders.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss. After 12 years of searching, they finally uncover the fiendish plot to exploit the helpless victim.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet the slaying of a young boy. After confronting his own demons brought forth by the tragic case, the detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge will lead the FBI, US Marshals and Chicago PD on an investigation of epic proportions. But when law enforcement finds the end of the trail, they learn the death count may climb higher.

programme.title: See No Evil: Far From Home
programme.desc: In 2017, Chinese exchange student, Yingying Zhang, mysteriously vanishes from the University of Illinois campus. Police and FBI turn to video surveillance footage to uncover the shocking and sinister reality and bring a cold-blooded murderer to justice.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Truck Stop
programme.desc: The deceased body of a young mother is found naked and gruesomely displayed inside a public truck stop near downtown Nashville. Sergeant Postiglione uncovers a trail of evidence across multiple states that lead him to a serial killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Young professional Sasha Samsudean comes home from a night out in downtown Orlando and is brutally murdered in her own apartment. Detectives must now turn to video surveillance footage to unravel the mystery and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: See No Evil: Far From Home
programme.desc: In 2017, Chinese exchange student, Yingying Zhang, mysteriously vanishes from the University of Illinois campus. Police and FBI turn to video surveillance footage to uncover the shocking and sinister reality and bring a cold-blooded murderer to justice.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Truck Stop
programme.desc: The deceased body of a young mother is found naked and gruesomely displayed inside a public truck stop near downtown Nashville. Sergeant Postiglione uncovers a trail of evidence across multiple states that lead him to a serial killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: Daniel Ott is just one day from moving with his girlfriend when an intruder shoots him dead with a shotgun. A stunning coincidence will lead the investigation into the heart of one of the most dangerous criminal rings in the country...

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: A Bronx house fire reveals a charred body inside. Police learn it's 20-year-old Kimberly Antonakos, and she's been burned alive. Was it her ex-boyfriend, Psycho? Or is her father connected to the mob? The truth is far more tragic.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Deadly Divorce
programme.desc: A Milwaukee mother is murdered in 1981. Her sons describe a masked man with a ponytail fleeing the home. Was it her bitter cop ex-husband? Or a neighbor who claims his gun was stolen? Police make a shocking arrest, but some have doubts to this day.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Kosher Killer
programme.desc: An Orthodox Jewish mother finds her daughter strangled to death in their Staten Island home. Her Muslim ex-boyfriend had been stalking her. Computer techs uncover a dangerous online dating habit. But the real killer was someone much closer to home.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: New York City fashion photographer Joel Schoenfeld is shot dead in his Greenwich Village studio one cold January morning. Joel appears to have it all, but detectives will eventually uncover a dark secret and a twisted tale of revenge...

programme.title: Deadly Women: For the Money Honey
programme.desc: For these women, one good man wasn't enough. A middle-aged woman used looks to prey on elderly gentleman; an army wife didn't want a soldier but a squad; and a serial wife cooks up meals to die for. These Deadly Women married for the money, honey.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Brides of Blood
programme.desc: These deadly women have a dangerous charm, but underneath lays the chilling darkness of a tortured mind.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: A social worker can't keep the lid on her possessive nature, a friendship is destroyed by jealous delusions, and young love leads to a violent end.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Innocent Blood
programme.desc: A young mom commits the ultimate act of betrayal; a jealous lover plots a horrible revenge; and twins becomes twice as hard for a housewife. These Deadly Women are willing to sacrifice 'Innocent Blood'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Anger Mismanagement
programme.desc: The match is struck, the fuse is lit, and it's only a matter of time before the 'Anger Mismanagement' of these Deadly Women will see them explode.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Death Benefits
programme.desc: These deadly women discovered that death isn't always full of sorrow but sometimes has 'benefits.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Heartless
programme.desc: These women's actions were so cruel they were almost unbelievable. Their callous acts proved they were 'Heartless'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Innocent blood spills when these deadly women reach their tipping point.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky
programme.desc: We expose the truth behind the history on the high seas and we take wing to separate myth from truth about the nation's pioneering aviators.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Spetsnaz
programme.desc: Spetsnaz are Russia's elite fighting force. From counter terrorist strike squads to special operations experts spearheading the Red Army, these ultimate warriors strike hard and fast.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Spetsnaz
programme.desc: Spetsnaz are Russia's elite fighting force. From counter terrorist strike squads to special operations experts spearheading the Red Army, these ultimate warriors strike hard and fast.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Smart Home
programme.desc: Tiffany Brooks and Jason Pickens offer a behind-the-build tour of HGTV Smart Home 2020 in the leafy suburb of Wexford, Pennsylvania. See how this design-build duo collaborates on the high-tech Craftsman home with industrial touches and a modern flair.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Hilton Head House Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Forever Home in Hilton Head
programme.desc: A couple search for their forever home in Hilton Head. Mike Holmes takes them through the houses and teaches the couple how to choose the best home for their present budget and their future plans.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Working a Miracle in Tampa
programme.desc: Sisters Michelle and Sonia run Miracles Outreach to house girls who have aged out of the foster program, and they need a new house and Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: New Home for Single Mom
programme.desc: Mike travels to Denver to help single mom Terrie find the right house for her and her daughters. Mike shows her how to identify any problems or imperfections that could turn the house from a dream home into a nightmare of repairs.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Modern Treehouse
programme.desc: Equipped with a 205 ft zipline entrance through the trees, Pete and his team work modern magic in Georgia.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Frank Lloyd Lakehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew channel Frank Lloyd Wright for a triple-decker treehouse on the shores of Lake Barkley in Kentucky.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nelson Family Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete gifts his daughter Emily, and Patrick, her boyfriend and an NTS carpenter, with the ultimate housewarming gift - a treehouse of their very own - by turning a piece of Nelson family history into a Moroccan marvel nested nearly 35 feet off the ground.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Hill Country Hideout
programme.desc: Pete and his gang ride out to the Lone Star State to build a double-decker hideout in Texas Hill Country. Six live oak trees are used to create rustic perfection with a saloon-style first floor for sippin' sarsaparilla and a glass floor for views below.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Treehouses IV
programme.desc: Join Pete Nelson on a journey to explore ingenious treehouse designs and engineering feats of builders the world over. At the end of his adventure, Pete embarks on his very own epic treehouse engineering repair.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Pirate Treasure Pool
programme.desc: Kelly Caviness and his team build two spectacular pools. The first is a modern, kid-friendly retreat for Mike, Lisa and their 2 children. The other pool is an epic pirate-themed water park complete with a hidden treasure room and animatronic pirates.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: A Houston, Texas, family is ready to make their dream pool a reality, so the Pool Kings accept the challenge to take this family's outdoor fun to the next level with a dynamic, resort-style pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Rockin' Out In Music City
programme.desc: A Nashville family hopes to make a big splash with a new resort-style swimming pool in their backyard.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto
programme.desc: A young family from Carlsbad, California wants a nice backyard where the kids can play. Mike and Jim are up for the challenge and build a power-packed pool with a spa, underwater volcano, custom slide and a Tuscan grotto.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Canyon Country Playground
programme.desc: A big family on a large property wants to replace their old patio and pool with an updated design. Mike and Jim deliver on the dream by transforming the yard into a canyon country playground. The backyard oasis includes a lazy river and a cave.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Bling by the Bay
programme.desc: A Florida family recruits the kings to design a sleek, modern pool for their oceanfront home on Tampa Bay. The crew creates an over-the-top pool with a vanishing edge spa and a roman soaking tub that's adorned with LED lighting and fire bowls.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Georgia Peach Pool Paradise
programme.desc: The Parrish family has saved their whole lives to build a tropical pool paradise in the heart of Georgia. But not everything is peachy on this build when hard soil and a complicated lazy river design present major challenges for the team.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Nutty
programme.desc: Giada, Tyler, Sunny, Wolfgang and Duff are going crazy for nuts.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: At a Deli
programme.desc: Food Network stars list their favourites from a deli, including brisket and corned beef.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ in Big Cities
programme.desc: Roger knows it's not just small towns that dish out big flavours. He heads to Bludso's Bar and Que in L.A., where the owner brings meat and hear to Tinseltown in a big way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roadside 'Cue
programme.desc: While road-tripping through Texas, Roger Mooking pulls the car over for some seriously delicious barbecue. In San Antonio, he makes a pit stop at The Box Street Social food truck to hang chickens and racks of ribs over a live fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: A Tale of Two BBQs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits an old-school barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a popular restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phuket
programme.desc: Andrew explores the alluring eats of Phuket, Thailand, an island paradise with bountiful natural gifts, aromatic flavors and multicultural cuisine. From spicy crab curry to sweet, crispy street snacks, Phuket's gastronomy is a feast for the senses.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: St. Louis
programme.desc: As the Gateway to the West, St. Louis has built a reputation for homegrown goodness on the backs of its hard-working people. Andrew Zimmern explores such edible icons as St. Louis-style BBQ, toasted ravioli and gooey butter cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London
programme.desc: London, England, is a multicultural melting pot, and Andrew Zimmern explores the dishes that have stayed the test of time: from the traditional Sunday roast and Yorkshire pudding to the classic pies 'n' mash and fish 'n' chips.

programme.desc: Everyone is excited because Clarabelle is putting on a musical about nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Message From Mars
programme.desc: Mickey, Goofy, Daisy and Pluto take their Rocket Ship to mars where they help Martian Mickey and his dog Pluto find a Martian Treasure in time for their Twilight Celebration.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Ducks
programme.desc: Donald volunteers to help a group of ducks get to a warm beach for their winter retreat.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Biggest Heist Ever/ Thrillin' Hilda!
programme.desc: After Von Drake invents a truck to carry all the Roadsters, Commander Heist steals it. Hilda asks the Happy Helpers to help her find a new sport to play.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Rockin' Roadsters!/ Safari, So Goody
programme.desc: The gang is invited to compete in Billy B's Hot Rod Switcheroo! The Happy Helpers become safari guides for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Perfecto Day!/ Running of the Roadsters!
programme.desc: While in Madrid, Mickey plans a perfect day for Minnie, but a playful baby bull has other plans. Minnie and Daisy make a bet with Mickey and Donald over who will win the race.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Pyramid Scheme/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Bongo and Rolly travel to Egypt to find the Great Pyramids. Then, the pugs try to deliver a Mother's Day card for Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach Ava that there is more to a delivery than speed. When Mia can't say goodbye to her friend, Chloe, the Junior Fliers show her that they can keep in touch!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Old McMickey Had a Farm/ Happy Lab Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Campy Camper Day!/ Founder's Day Flounder!
programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Mickey, Donald and Daisy can't unplug from their electronic devices. Mickey and the gang celebrate the 100th birthday of Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Arma-Leader/ Owlette Slips Up
programme.desc: Armadylan must prove he's a good leader by training the Wolfies; the Wolfies steal Owlette gadgets.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Bluey: Grannies / Yoga Ball / Calypso

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Best, Best Friend / Counting Kermits
programme.desc: When he fears he's losing his BFF, Fozzie tries to prove he's Kermit's BEST best friend. Bunsen and Beaker invent a Make-Another-You-Inator to help Kermit play four games at once.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Going Green/ Tattle Tail
programme.desc: Jeanette signs the Chipmunks and Chipettes up for a green living competition. Alvin likes a girl at school so he agrees to look after her talking bird, but he's nervous about the bird blabbing when he says something damaging.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Suck Toad/ Secret Admirer
programme.desc: Brittany is preparing a class speech on 'inner beauty' when an endangered species makes its home on her face. Alvin believes that Kevin has a secret crush on one of the Chipettes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Brittany the Body Snatcher/ Agent Smith
programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.desc: Alvin decides to host the coolest paintball party ever at his house for Kevin's birthday. Then, when the Chipmunks try to keep up with the neighbourhood bully's powerful computer game, they end up causing a gigantic disaster.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Which is Wish/ Nuts and Dangerous
programme.desc: After Timmy and Chloe switch places, they might be stuck forever. Timmy and Dad take part in a film festival to be closer, but it ends up causing tension.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hare Raiser/ The Kale Patch Caper

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad Meet Crimson Chin
programme.desc: When Timmy accidentally releases the crimson chin's arch-villain, all heck breaks loose.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Anti-Poof

programme.title: The Loud House: Project Loud House/ In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln must help his sisters get ready faster so they don't miss the bus. Lincoln ends up being the swing vote on where family vacation takes place.

programme.title: The Loud House: Left in the Dark/ Get the Message

programme.title: All That

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: In-depth conversations with global thought leaders and cultural influencers.

programme.title: H2O: The Molecule That Made Us: Pulse
programme.desc: Explore how water arrived on Earth and how water came to underpin every aspect of existence from dragonflies to deserts in bloom to human life.

programme.title: SciGirls: Digging Archaeology

programme.title: History Detectives: Order of Leopold, Suffrage Pennant, WB Cartoon
programme.desc: A contributor wants to know how his father earned the Order of Leopold, the highest military honour bestowed by the Belgian government. A suffragette pennant traces back to the early days of women's liberation.

programme.title: Africa's Great Civilizations: The Atlantic Age/ Commerce and the Clash of Civilizations
programme.desc: Gates explores the impact of the Atlantic world, creating new kingdoms & transatlantic slave trade. Gates explores the dynamism of 19th century Africa and the 'Scramble' for its riches.

programme.title: Breakthrough: The Ideas That Changed the World: The Rocket
programme.desc: Learn the explosive history of the rocket, from its origin in ancient China, to its use as a weapon of war, to how adding hydrogen allowed it to carry astronauts all the way to the moon.

programme.title: Nova: Lost Viking Army
programme.desc: Bioarchaeologists investigate a ninth-century mass grave in a rural English village. The remains could unlock the mystery of the 'Great Heathen Army,' a legendary Viking fighting force that once invaded England.

programme.title: The Woman in White
programme.desc: Sir Percival's secret is exposed, and Walter risks everything for the woman he loves.

programme.title: POV Shorts: Joe's Violin
programme.desc: A violin forges a friendship between a Holocaust survivor and a 12-year-old Bronx school girl.

programme.title: American Masters: Decoding Watson

programme.title: The Gene: An Intimate History
programme.desc: Geneticists wrestle with the moral implications of groundbreaking new technologies that offer both promise and peril. Audrey, a determined young scientist with Spinal Muscular Atrophy, researches a treatment for her own condition.

programme.title: Psych: Dual Spires
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus receive a mysterious email inviting them to the Cinnamon Festival in Dual Spires, a small town nearly invisible on a map. They arrive and become embroiled in the mystery of a teen girl's drowning death.

programme.title: Psych: We Would Like to Thank the Academy
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus help the SBPD solve a case, but are soon reprimanded for their efforts because they did not follow police procedure. As a result, Chief Vick arranges for them to take a three-week crash course at the Police Academy.

programme.title: Psych: Dead Bear Walking
programme.desc: Officials are quick to point the finger at a zoo's polar bear when its trainer is killed unexpectedly, but Shawn believes the animal to be innocent, and becomes an advocate for the bear.

programme.title: Psych: The Polarizing Express
programme.desc: Shawn's antics cause evidence to be thrown out in the prosecution of a known crime lord. It also results in the case being dismissed and the Psych agency and Henry being fired.

programme.title: Psych: Yang 3 in 2D
programme.desc: The Yin/ Yang trilogy comes to a thrilling close as Shawn and Gus race to save a woman kidnapped by Yin. This time, they are forced to use Yang's knowledge of Yin to solve the case and allow her to accompany them on the investigation.

programme.title: Psych: Shawn Rescues Darth Vader
programme.desc: When Shawn finds a dead body while on a mission to retrieve a stolen Darth Vader collector's item from the British Ambassador's son, his credibility as a psychic could be jeopardized if the SBPD learns he saw the body in person.

programme.title: Psych: Last Night Gus
programme.desc: Shawn, Gus, Lassiter and Woody wake up in the Psych Office having no recollection of what happened the night before. When a body shows up dead and all signs point to them, they believe someone drugged them.

programme.title: Psych: This Episode Sucks
programme.desc: Lassiter's new relationship with a mysterious and beautiful woman is placed in jeopardy when Shawn and Gus are convinced she is a murderer.

programme.title: Psych: The Amazing Psych-Man and Tap Man
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus investigate the whereabouts of a masked vigilante who is trying to take down the same local drug syndicate that the SBPD is after.

programme.title: Psych: Dead Man's Curveball
programme.desc: After the hitting coach of Santa Barbara's minor league baseball team mysteriously drops dead, the team's manager hires Psych to investigate and has Shawn go undercover as the new hitting instructor with Gus as the team mascot.

programme.title: Psych: Shawn Interrupted
programme.desc: A billionaire, accused of murdering his assistant, is found 'not guilty' by reason of insanity, causing the SBPD to send Shawn and Gus undercover at the mental hospital he is being held at to prove he lied to the jury and is sane.

programme.title: Psych: In for a Penny...
programme.desc: Juliet's estranged father, a charming con man who wants to mend their broken relationship, visits, but when the opportunity to pull off a dream con is presented to him, he bends his decision to stay on the right side of the law.

programme.title: Psych: The Tao of Gus
programme.desc: When a woman tells the SBPD she witnessed a murder in broad daylight, Shawn and Gus are the only ones who believe her. They protect her by hiding her at a remote ranch, where the residents label themselves as progressive intellectuals.

programme.title: Psych: Neil Simon Lover's Retreat
programme.desc: Shawn and Juliet's romantic getaway vacation from casework and the SBPD is interrupted when their hotel room is robbed and a dead body surfaces at a nearby winery.

programme.title: Psych: Indiana Shawn and the Temple of the Kinda Crappy, Rusty Old Dagger
programme.desc: Despereaux, Shawn and Gus race against an evil gang of thieves to find a mythical dagger that, according to legend, will unlock the hidden treasure of a deceased billionaire.

programme.title: Psych: Heeeeere's Lassie!
